summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SG Securipass portfolio website. Backend APIs working perfectly. Frontend components render correctly with proper content and navigation. One responsive design issue identified with mobile menu.

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile menu toggle not visible on mobile devices. Responsive breakpoints not working correctly - desktop nav shows on mobile, mobile toggle hidden on mobile
ui_bugs.technical_details: Element has display:none on mobile (390px width), md:hidden class not working as expected

passed_tests: Hero section with title 'Protégez vos transactions en toute confiance'
Features section with 6 feature cards in bento grid
How It Works section with 4 steps (Téléchargez, Activez, Configurez, Validez)
Footer with brand and 12 footer links
Navigation link scroll functionality to correct sections
All CTA buttons clickable and properly linked
No console errors or broken images

success_percentage.frontend: 90% - All components render and work except mobile menu

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix mobile menu responsive design: The mobile menu toggle should be visible on mobile devices (screen width < 768px) and the desktop navigation should be hidden on mobile. Check Tailwind CSS configuration and responsive classes.
